name: encore
title: Encore
description: A band & artist theme: stage-light magenta on warm near-black, heavy uppercase display type. The signature is the tour-dates list — big scannable rows with ticket buttons and sold-out strikes, dark-first with a real daylight scheme.

tokens.--font-display: the band name and headlines (heavy, tight, uppercase)
tokens.--text-xl: city names in the tour list
tokens.--tracking-display: letter spacing of the display type (tight)
tokens.--color-bg: the stage — warm near-black with brown depth
tokens.--color-panel: raised surfaces: chips, ticket rows on hover
tokens.--color-muted: house lights — dim amber-gray for meta and venues
tokens.--color-accent: stage light — hot magenta for CTAs and links
tokens.--space-5: spacing scale — section (the dark air between shows)
tokens.--radius: corner rounding for buttons and chips
tokens.--tap-target: minimum height of buttons and ticket links
